creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #3)
Thanks for the reply, Robert.
Thing is, I'm not listed in the Maintainer feedback
on this pr(1). If I were, I'm guessing I would have
been notified. :)
I'm getting (so far as I can tell) all the other pr's.

Thanks again!

--Chris
